content.text:
Skills store policy (operator configured):
1. For skills discovery/install/update, try `skillhub` first (cn-optimized).
2. If unavailable, rate-limited, or no match, fallback to `clawhub` (public-registry).
3. Do not claim exclusivity. Public and private registries are both allowed.
4. Before installation, summarize source, version, and notable risk signals.
5. For search requests, execute `exec` with `skillhub search <keywords>` first and report the command output.
6. In the current session, reply directly. Do NOT call `message` tool just to send progress updates.

[cron:8a5bdbe1-7504-4194-a13e-a043be6ad5ee 系统健康检查（千问3.5）] 请检查系统状态并报告：\n1. 当前时间和日期\n2. 简要总结当前系统健康状况\n3. 如果有需要关注的事项，请提醒用户\n保持回复简洁明了。
Current time: Wednesday, March 18th, 2026 — 12:30 PM (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-03-18 04:30 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

You can use "skillhub install [skill]" to install.
healthcheck  healthcheck
  - Track water and sleep with JSON file storage
使用JSON文件存储追踪饮水与睡眠
  - version: 1.0.2
healthcheck-ready  Healthcheck Ready
  - Performs a quick risk posture check on the host and provides a concise snapshot of OpenClaw's security and readiness status.
快速检查主机风险态势，提供OpenClaw安全与就绪状态的简明概览。
  - version: 1.0.0
openclaw-healthcheck-cron  OpenClaw Healthcheck Cron
  - Create and run a reusable OpenClaw deep healthcheck automation using a cron job plus a script. Use when setting up scheduled OpenClaw health audits, standard...
使用 cron 任务和脚本创建可复用的 OpenClaw 深度健康检查自动化，适用于设置定时健康审计及标准化...
  - version: 1.0.0
skill-doctorbot-healthcheck-free  Doctorbot Healthcheck Free
  - 🩺 Free Security & Health Audit. Your OpenClaw deserves a check-up. This skill performs a non-invasive scan to detect security risks, outdated software, and misconfigurations.
🩺 免费安全健康审计。为OpenClaw进行非侵入式体检，检测安全风险、软件过期及配置错误。
  - version: 0.1.0
model-healthcheck  Model Healthcheck
  - Test all configured models for availability. Activate when user says "test models", "check models", "model healthcheck", "测试模型", "测试所有模型", "检查模型", or "模型健康检查".
Test all configured models for availability. Activate when user says "test models", "check models", "model healthcheck", "测试模型", "测试所有模型", "检查模型", or "模型健康检查".
  - version: 1.0.0
platform-healthcheck  Platform Healthcheck
  - Health check dashboard for agent platform APIs. Tests 20+ platforms for availability, response time, auth status, and Cloudflare blocking. Run: python3 scrip...
Health check dashboard for agent platform APIs. Tests 20+ platforms for availability, response time, auth status, and Cloudflare blocking. Run: python3 scrip...
  - version: 1.0.0
bluebubbles-healthcheck  Bluebubbles Healthcheck
  - Diagnoses and auto-heals BlueBubbles ↔ OpenClaw iMessage connectivity. Use when: iMessages stop arriving after a gateway restart, webhook connection is broke...
Diagnoses and auto-heals BlueBubbles ↔ OpenClaw iMessage connectivity. Use when: iMessages stop arriving after a gateway restart, webhook connection is broke...
  - version: 0.1.3
mh-healthcheck  MH healthcheck
  - Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, r...
Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, r...
  - version: 1.0.0
botlearn-healthcheck  botlearn-healthcheck
  - botlearn-healthcheck — BotLearn autonomous health inspector for OpenClaw instances across 5 domains (hardware, config, security, skills, autonomy); triggers...
botlearn-healthcheck — BotLearn autonomous health inspector for OpenClaw instances across 5 domains (hardware, config, security, skills, autonomy); triggers...
  - version: 1.0.5
aviation-healthcheck  Aviation Healthcheck
  - 航空维修健康检查 - FAA/EASA/CAAC适航指令、航空安全通告、MRO行业新闻、波音空客技术通告、OpenClaw状态、磁盘空间
  - version: 1.0.0
pc-assistant  Pc Assistant
  - PC healthcheck and diagnostics with detailed system information and actionable recommendations. Works on Windows, macOS, and Linux. Read-only system diagnost...
PC healthcheck and diagnostics with detailed system information and actionable recommendations. Works on Windows, macOS, and Linux. Read-only system diagnost...
  - version: 1.2.4
multi-skill-automation-suite  Multi-Skill Automation Suite
  - Comprehensive automation suite combining multiple OpenClaw skills for security, development, content processing, and utilities. Includes healthcheck, git ess...
Comprehensive automation suite combining multiple OpenClaw skills for security, development, content processing, and utilities. Includes healthcheck, git ess...
  - version: 1.0.0
dockerfile-hardening-audit  Dockerfile Hardening Audit
  - Statically audit Dockerfiles for common container hardening risks (root user, unpinned/latest base images, missing healthchecks, and risky build patterns).
  - version: 1.0.0
clawhub-publish-doctor  ClawHub Publish Doctor
  - Diagnose and mitigate ClawHub/ClawDHUB publish failures (auth, browser-login, missing dependencies, pending security-scan visibility errors, and wrong profil...
诊断并修复 ClawHub/ClawDHUB 发布失败（认证、浏览器登录、依赖缺失、安全扫描挂起及配置错误等）
  - version: 1.0.0
clean-skill  Clean Skill
  - Cross-reference restaurant recommendations from Xiaohongshu (小红书) and Dianping (大众点评) to validate restaurant quality and consistency. Use when querying resta...
Cross-reference restaurant recommendations from Xiaohongshu (小红书) and Dianping (大众点评) to validate restaurant quality and consistency. Use when querying resta...
  - version: 1.1.0
currency-converter  Currency Converter
  - 提供实时或近实时的货币汇率查询与转换服务。
提供实时或近实时的货币汇率查询与转换服务。
  - version: 1.0.1
hostinger-vps-optimizer  Hostinger VPS Optimizer
  - Applies kernel tuning, web server optimization, security hardening, and resource limits to boost Hostinger VPS performance and reduce costs.
应用内核调优、Web服务器优化、安全加固和资源限制，提升Hostinger VPS性能并降低成本。
  - version: 1.0.0
notebooklm-ops  NotebookLM Ops
  - Manage NotebookLM MCP auth lifecycle on Linux by automating GUI startup, auth refresh, status check, and cleanup for frequent cookie expiry.
Linux 平台 NotebookLM MCP 认证生命周期管理，自动化 GUI 启动、认证刷新、状态检查及清理，应对 Cookie 频繁过期。
  - version: 1.0.0
qr-gen  QR Code Generator
  - Generate QR codes from text, URLs, WiFi credentials, vCards, or any data. Use when the user wants to create a QR code, share a link as a scannable code, gene...
从文本、网址、WiFi凭证、vCard或任意数据生成二维码。适用于创建二维码、将链接转为可扫描代码等场景。
  - version: 1.1.0
searching-group-leader  Searching Group Leader
  - You are the leader of searching group . Break down the task into independent and complementary sub-tasks. Then describe each sub-task with natural language a...
作为搜索组组长，将任务分解为独立互补的子任务，并用自然语言描述各子任务。
  - version: 0.1.0
